name: Cat
fact: A cat loves to nap in warm sunny spots.

name: Dog
fact: Dogs wag their tails when they are happy.

name: Cow
fact: A cow gives us milk to drink.

name: Goat
fact: Goats love to climb up on rocks.

name: Horse
fact: Horses can run very very fast.

name: Lion
fact: The lion is called the king of the jungle.

name: Tiger
fact: Tigers have orange and black stripes.

name: Elephant
fact: Elephants use their trunk like a hand.

name: Monkey
fact: Monkeys love to swing from tree to tree.

name: Rabbit
fact: Rabbits have long ears and hop very high.

name: Bear
fact: Bears love to eat honey.

name: Fish
fact: Fish breathe underwater with gills.

name: Frog
fact: Frogs love to jump from leaf to leaf.

name: Snake
fact: Snakes slide along the ground without legs.

name: Turtle
fact: Turtles carry their home on their back.

name: Camel
fact: Camels can walk far in the hot desert.

name: Zebra
fact: Zebras have black and white stripes.

name: Giraffe
fact: Giraffes have very very long necks.

name: Panda
fact: Pandas love munching on bamboo.

name: Fox
fact: Foxes have soft bushy tails.
